content.title: Type 'Product' failed to compile
content.message:
The node type 'Northwind/Product' was parked after a compile failure and will not be retried until its source is fixed. Compilation failed: Compilation failed for 'Northwind/Product':

CS0105 Warning (line 27): The using directive for 'System.ComponentModel' appeared previously in this namespace
